title: <li>Analyze and correct grammatical and mechanical errors in a given passage. (C
content:
• Analyze and correct grammatical and mechanical errors in a given passage. (CO1)
  • Identify commonly confused words, spellings, and proper abbreviations. (CO1)
  • Recognize the structure of an essay and its components. (CO4)
